Competency cards are valid for 5 years. If you have more than one qualification on the card, it expires 5 years after you complete the first course. For example, if you finished the RSA course in 1 August 2014, ​and then complete RCG training in 1 March 2015 – your card expires 1 August 2019. Working with an expired competency card is illegal and you may get a fine. Please indicate your RSA competency card expiry date below.
